deployment_environments.access: Cloudflare Access for Marat and approved internal operators.
deployment_environments.data_posture: Internal-full MB-P operational proof is allowed when Access-protected and not publicly reachable.
deployment_environments.operator_mode: Allowed for approved owner/operator users through governed proposal/action/receipt paths.
deployment_environments.claim_posture: Internal development and MB-P operations learning/testing only.

deployment_environments.access: Cloudflare Access plus named tester invitation/access code.
deployment_environments.data_posture: Redacted or explicitly owner-approved dataset only.
deployment_environments.operator_mode: Watch or proposal-only by default; no direct MB-P writeback.
deployment_environments.xcp_second_level_access: Disabled by default and enabled separately by admin per user.
deployment_environments.claim_posture: Customer feedback and controlled walkthrough only; no production SaaS claim.

access_policy.waiting_list: Allowed for lead capture and invitation queue.
access_policy.access_code: Base64url-style opaque code is allowed only as an invitation/routing hint, not authentication.
access_policy.required_authentication: Cloudflare Access identity plus server-side entitlement validation.
access_policy.xlooop_first_level_access: Default product access after invitation approval.

operation_modes.allowed_use: Internal engineering, design review, verifier development, local screenshots, fixtures, and owner review.
Internal MB-P operations, owner-local/internal SSE proof, live read-model snapshots, gateway receipts, retrospectives, and governance or architecture updates.
Presenter-controlled explanation of the MB-P loop, selected screenshots, restricted demos, and pilot-discovery conversations.
External customer-facing operations, pilots under terms, and production-like service claims.

claim_boundary.current_topline: Metadata-only MB-P projection proof loop and controlled walkthrough substrate.
must_not_say: production SaaS fully operating live MB-P
signed pilot terms ready without owner claim sign-off
claim_boundary.required_caveat: This surface uses owner-approved metadata-only MB-P projection data for owner operations only and remains no-writeback; public claims require redacted projection data and owner claim sign-off. Public marketing must be forward-looking and canonical on xlooop.com; xlooop.ai is retired or redirected after the new site launches.

stream_claim_posture.required_caveat: Operations streams are MB-P-owned read-model snapshots with internal SLA-protected receipt polling, not public-safe live streaming operations until owner claim sign-off and public-safe redaction exist.
must_not_say: fully live MB-P operation without caveat

tiers.allowed_claim: Xlooop can run the MB-P proof loop from operator intent to governed packet, decision ledger, evidence, sign-off, learning, and recovery/next action using owner-approved internal projection data.
required_caveats: Owner-approved metadata-only MB-P projection data may be included in the active snapshot.
No direct MB-P repository writeback is allowed from Xlooop.

tiers.allowed_claim: Owner-led selected buyer or investor walkthrough of the MB-P loop.
required_caveats: Do not present owner-operation exports as unrestricted public-safe evidence without owner claim sign-off.
Do not claim production SaaS readiness.
Use the presenter caveat brief before external use.

tiers.allowed_claim: Pilot-discovery conversation about the governed delivery loop and operating model.
required_caveats: Discovery does not equal signed pilot readiness.
Owner-approved claim hygiene is required before pilot terms.

tiers.blocked_because: owner-operation projection is not a redacted, owner-signed unrestricted public demo claim
owner-approved public/private claim sign-off and pilot terms packet are not recorded here
production SLA, public-safe redaction posture, and owner claim sign-off are not recorded here
